description:
System Info Phase
Get System Type Run inline: E7,CF Verify: System type is PMax8500 (Cronus)

LOOP 20 times
Port Discovery Phase
Display Port Information Run inline: DA,,NVME,LINK,ALL on selected director

Define FAB-A Ports Parse output for FAB-A port addresses (0xXXXX) Store as FAB-A Ports

Define FAB-B Ports Parse output for FAB-B port addresses (0xXXXX) Store as FAB-B Ports


FAB-A Port Toggle Phase
Disable FAB-A Ports Run inline: C1,NVMM,FAB-A Ports,OFLN on selected director

Wait 1 Second

Enable FAB-A Ports Run inline: C1,NVMM,FAB-A Ports,ONLN on selected director

Wait 1 Second

FAB-B Port Toggle Phase
Disable FAB-B Ports Run inline: C1,NVMM,FAB-B Ports,OFLN on selected director

Wait 1 Second

Enable FAB-B Ports Run inline: C1,NVMM,FAB-B Ports,ONLN on selected director

Wait 1 Second


Director DD Test Phase
Drop All Fabric Ports Run inline: C1,NVMM,ALL,OFLN on selected director

Wait for DN to Drop DD Wait 1 minute

Verify Director is DD Check director state Verify: Director state is DD (Degraded)

Wait Before DN Recovery Wait 1 minute

Recover DD Director Run inline: FE,CE on selected director

Wait for DN to Recover Wait 1 minute

Verify DN Recovered Check director state Verify: Director is NOT DD
plain_value_text:
System Info Phase
Get System Type Run inline: E7,CF Verify: System type is PMax8500 (Cronus)

LOOP 20 times
Port Discovery Phase
Display Port Information Run inline: DA,,NVME,LINK,ALL on selected director

Define FAB-A Ports Parse output for FAB-A port addresses (0xXXXX) Store as FAB-A Ports

Define FAB-B Ports Parse output for FAB-B port addresses (0xXXXX) Store as FAB-B Ports


FAB-A Port Toggle Phase
Disable FAB-A Ports Run inline: C1,NVMM,FAB-A Ports,OFLN on selected director

Wait 1 Second

Enable FAB-A Ports Run inline: C1,NVMM,FAB-A Ports,ONLN on selected director

Wait 1 Second

FAB-B Port Toggle Phase
Disable FAB-B Ports Run inline: C1,NVMM,FAB-B Ports,OFLN on selected director

Wait 1 Second

Enable FAB-B Ports Run inline: C1,NVMM,FAB-B Ports,ONLN on selected director

Wait 1 Second


Director DD Test Phase
Drop All Fabric Ports Run inline: C1,NVMM,ALL,OFLN on selected director

Wait for DN to Drop DD Wait 1 minute

Verify Director is DD Check director state Verify: Director state is DD (Degraded)

Wait Before DN Recovery Wait 1 minute

Recover DD Director Run inline: FE,CE on selected director

Wait for DN to Recover Wait 1 minute

Verify DN Recovered Check director state Verify: Director is NOT DD
